code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s) s
  when None ""
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s) s
  when None ""
  end

  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v) v
  when None 0
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line1)

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(p) p
    when None ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(v) v
    when None 0
    end
    if n > t
      result = list.push(result, n)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < result.len()
    let v = match result.get(j)
    when Some(x) x
    when None 0
    end
    if j == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  println(output)
  Ok(())
end
